name: Grilled Salmon with Racially and Tomato Cruda
recipeIngredient: 2 bunches romaine lettuce, hard stems removed, washed and spun dry
4 6-8 ounce salmon fillets, skin and pin bones removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill, barbecue or broiler.
2. In a large mixing bowl toss the cleaned romaine lettuce with 3 ounces of extra virgin olive oil, lemon juice, salt and pepper.
3. Arrange romaine on four serving plates as your base for the salmon.
4. Brush remaining olive oil over each salmon fillet. Season fillets with salt.
5. Grill over high heat about 4 minutes per side (for medium rare salmon).
6. Remove from grill and place filets over romaine.
7. Pour half cup homemade tomato sauce over salmon and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
